info.title: Haldir API — Governance for AI Agents
info.description:
Haldir is a security and governance layer for AI agents, composed of three modules:

- **Gate** — Session-scoped permissions. Create short-lived sessions with explicit scopes (read, write, admin, spend:N) and TTLs. Every privileged operation must pass through Gate first.
- **Vault** — Encrypted secret storage with access control. Secrets are AES-encrypted at rest and only released to sessions that hold the required scope. Vault also manages spend budgets and payment authorization.
- **Watch** — Tamper-evident audit logging with automatic anomaly detection. Every tool call, payment, and decision is recorded. Suspicious patterns (rapid-fire actions, high-cost operations, unusual tools) are flagged in real time.

Authenticate with `Authorization: Bearer hld_...` or `X-API-Key: hld_...`. Create your first key via `POST /v1/keys` (no auth required for the bootstrap key).

tags.name: proxy
tags.description: Governance proxy for upstream MCP servers

tags.name: audit
tags.description: Query audit trail and spend summaries

post.description: Create a new API key. The very first key requires no authentication. Subsequent keys require either a valid API key or the HALDIR_BOOTSTRAP_TOKEN.

bootstrap_token.description: HALDIR_BOOTSTRAP_TOKEN value, required when creating additional keys without an existing API key

post.description: Create a scoped session for an AI agent with explicit permissions, TTL, and optional spend budget.

spend_limit.description: Maximum USD spend for this session

get.description: Retrieve the current state of a session including scopes, spend, remaining budget, and validity.

delete.description: Immediately revoke a session, permanently disabling all permissions.

post.description: Check whether a session holds a specific scope. Use before sensitive operations to avoid 403 errors.

scope.description: The scope to check (e.g. read, write, admin)

post.description: Store a secret in the Vault, encrypted at rest with AES. Optionally require a specific scope for retrieval.

scope_required.description: Minimum scope a session must hold to read this secret

get.description: List all stored secret names (never values).
Retrieve a decrypted secret. Pass X-Session-ID header or session_id query param for scope-based access control.

parameters.name: X-Session-ID
parameters.description: Session ID for scope enforcement (alternative to query param)

delete.description: Permanently delete a secret from the Vault.

post.description: Authorize a payment against a session's spend budget. Denied if insufficient budget remains.
Log an action to the tamper-evident audit trail. Watch automatically flags anomalous patterns.

flagged.description: Whether the action was flagged as anomalous

get.description: Retrieve audit log entries with optional filters by session, agent, tool, or flagged status.
Get aggregated spend data, optionally filtered by session or agent.
Get API usage count for the current tenant, optionally for a specific month.

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: Month in YYYY-MM format (defaults to current month)

post.description: Add a rule that triggers human-in-the-loop approval for matching actions.
Submit an action for human approval. The agent polls the approval status until it is approved or denied.

get.description: Poll the status of a pending approval request.

post.description: Approve a pending approval request, allowing the agent to proceed.
Deny a pending approval request, blocking the agent's action.

get.description: List all approval requests that are still pending a decision.

post.description: Register a URL to receive real-time event notifications (anomaly, approval_requested, budget_exhausted).

events.description: Events to subscribe to (defaults to all)

get.description: List all webhooks registered for this account.

post.description: Register an upstream MCP server to proxy through Haldir. Haldir discovers the server's tools automatically.

error.description: Present if upstream had errors during discovery

get.description: List all registered upstream MCP servers and their health status.
List all tools available through the proxy, aggregated from all registered upstreams.

post.summary: Call a tool through the proxy
post.description: Call a tool on an upstream MCP server through Haldir's governance layer. The session is validated, permissions checked, policies enforced, and the call is logged to the audit trail.

arguments.description: Arguments to pass to the tool

schema.description: MCP tool result with content array

403.description: Blocked by policy or insufficient permissions

post.description: Add a policy to the proxy that controls which tools agents can use. Supported types: block_tool, allow_list, deny_list, spend_limit, rate_limit, time_window.

get.description: List all active proxy governance policies.
Full platform metrics including API keys, sessions, actions, spend, secrets, payments, approvals, and top tools/agents.
Returns service status. No authentication required.
Returns service info and available endpoint groups. No authentication required.

BearerAuth.description: Pass your Haldir API key as a Bearer token: `Authorization: Bearer hld_...`

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Pass your Haldir API key via the X-API-Key header

retry_after.description: Seconds until the rate limit window resets

Unauthorized.description: Missing, invalid, or revoked API key

RateLimited.description: Rate limit exceeded (per-tier hourly limits: free=100, pro=5000, enterprise=50000)
